summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of The Calm Mind Collection PDF products landing page. All backend APIs functioning correctly, frontend UI components properly rendered and interactive, with successful PDF downloads and tracking functionality.

design_issues.issue: Minor bento grid validation - automated test could not perfectly verify CSS grid spanning, but visual confirmation shows proper layout

passed_tests: Products Endpoint (GET /api/products) - Returns 5 products + bundle info
All 5 PDF Download Endpoints (GET /api/download/{product_id}) - journal, planner, ebook, workbook, cards
Statistics Endpoint (GET /api/stats) - Shows download counts by product
Download All Endpoint (GET /api/download-all) - Returns all download links
Homepage loads with all sections (hero, products, bundle, testimonials, about, footer)
Navigation links (Products, Bundle, About) are clickable and functional
All 5 product cards display with correct data (title, price, features, badges)
All download buttons are clickable and trigger PDF downloads
Bundle section shows pricing with save percentage (Save 46%)
Mobile responsiveness - layout adapts correctly to mobile viewport
Product cards show proper pricing, features, and badges
Testimonials section displays 3 testimonials with ratings
About section with statistics grid present

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major UI components functional, minor bento grid test limitation)
